theme: composing a slow shimmer from only high piano strings
title: Beat Forge: A Slow Shimmer from Forbidden-High Strings
strategies: trivial: one high tone -> flat envelope at the target's mean level (matches DC only)
greedy: FFT the target envelope E, spread the budget into equal-amplitude beat pairs at its dominant spacings matched in phase (amplitude-domain, uniform strength, ignores window)

strong: reformulate in difference-frequency/POWER space -- decompose E^2 into DC + slow cosines, realize each chosen harmonic as a disjoint beat pair with window-compensated discrete amplitudes and matched phase, jointly fitting the power DC
invalid: frequencies outside the forbidden-low band -> rejected
